rules.message: Distributional notation P(Y|do(X)) is forbidden in v1.0 engine scope.
rules.suggestion: Use deterministic intervention execution language or Y_{do(X=x)} only in math-facing docs.

rules.message: Overclaim: v1.0 engine is not a generic causal inference system.
v1.0 engine computes deterministic values rather than estimates.
rules.suggestion: Prefer compute, calculate, or solve where the code is deterministic.

rules.message: v1.0 scope is deterministic solve/execute, not inference.
rules.suggestion: Prefer compute, solve, or execute if the path is deterministic.

rules.message: Adjustment logic is outside v1.0 engine-core scope.
rules.suggestion: Move adjustment claims to deferred scope or support-layer explanation.

rules.message: Identifiability language should be framed carefully under v1.0 assumptions.
rules.suggestion: Prefer model completeness or confounder coverage unless formal identifiability is implemented.

rules.message: Counterfactual reasoning is outside v1.0 engine-core scope.
rules.suggestion: Keep counterfactual language out of engine-core files unless explicitly deferred or isolated.
